capabilities.name: croston
capabilities.description: Estimate non-zero demand size and the interval between demands separately.
capabilities.input_contract: Non-negative daily demand history with possible zero-demand periods.
capabilities.output_contract: Non-negative daily forecast and horizon-total target inventory.
capabilities.source_title: Forecasting and Stock Control for Intermittent Demands
extraction_warnings: This implementation is classic Croston rather than the Syntetos-Boylan adjustment.

capabilities.name: last_value
capabilities.description: Repeat the latest observed demand as a transparent baseline.
capabilities.input_contract: Non-negative daily demand history and a positive forecast horizon.
capabilities.output_contract: Non-negative daily forecast and horizon-total target inventory.
capabilities.source_title: M5 accuracy competition results, findings, and conclusions

capabilities.name: moving_average
capabilities.description: Forecast stable demand with the mean of the most recent observations.
capabilities.input_contract: Non-negative daily demand history and a positive forecast horizon.
capabilities.output_contract: Non-negative daily forecast and horizon-total target inventory.
capabilities.source_title: The accuracy of intermittent demand estimates

capabilities.name: ridge_lag
capabilities.description: Fit regularized autoregression on recent demand lags and forecast recursively.
capabilities.input_contract: Dense non-negative daily history with enough observations for lag construction.
capabilities.output_contract: Non-negative daily forecast and horizon-total target inventory.

capabilities.name: seasonal_naive
capabilities.description: Repeat the latest weekly pattern over the forecast horizon.
capabilities.input_contract: Non-negative daily demand history and a positive forecast horizon.
capabilities.output_contract: Non-negative daily forecast and horizon-total target inventory.
capabilities.source_title: M5 accuracy competition results, findings, and conclusions
